message.content:
@startuml
package com {
    class Application {
        start(Stage primaryStage): void
    }
}

package yuhao {
    class pigdice {
        class main {
            interface main(String[] args): void
            interface rollBtPress(MouseEvent event): void
            interface disBtPress(MouseEvent event): void
            interface resBtPress(MouseEvent event): void
            interface reStart(): void
            interface checkWinner(): void
            interface playEnd(): void
            interface checkButton(int signal): void
            interface inButton(ImageView button, int X): void
            interface outButton(ImageView button): void
            interface roRes(ImageView button): void

            main(
                myDices: PairOfDice
                rbDices: PairOfDice
                myScore: Text
                rbScore: Text
                rollBt: ImageView
                disBt: ImageView
                resBt: ImageView
                win: ImageView
                winBG: ImageView
            )

            rollBtPress(MouseEvent event)
            disBtPress(MouseEvent event)
            resBtPress(MouseEvent event)
            reStart()
            checkWinner()
            playEnd()
            checkButton(int signal)
            inButton(ImageView button, int X)
            outButton(ImageView button)
            roRes(ImageView button)
        }

        class PairOfDice {
            interface PairOfDice(int TorB, int x, int y)
            interface getScore(): int
            interface setZero(): void
            interface createDices(): void
            interface resetDices(): void
            interface rollDices(): int
            interface autoRollIds(): void

            PairOfDice(int TorB, int x, int y)
        }
    }
}

package com {
    class Application {
        start(Stage primaryStage): void
    }
}

class Application {
    start(Stage primaryStage): void
}

class Dice {
    interface Dice(int LorR, int TorB)
    interface getNum(): int
    interface createDice(): void
    interface resetDice(): void
    interface getRandAll(): void
    interface startRoll(int anotherTime): void
    interface autoRoll(List<Integer> list, int counter): void

    Dice(int LorR, int TorB)
}

class PairOfDice {
    interface PairOfDice(int TorB, int x, int y)
    interface getScore(): int
    interface setZero(): void
    interface createDices(): void
    interface resetDices(): void
    interface rollDices(): int
    interface autoRollIds(): void

    PairOfDice(int TorB, int x, int y)
}

class main {
    interface main(String[] args): void
    interface rollBtPress(MouseEvent event): void
    interface disBtPress(MouseEvent event): void
    interface resBtPress(MouseEvent event): void
    interface reStart(): void
    interface checkWinner(): void
    interface playEnd(): void
    interface checkButton(int signal): void
    interface inButton(ImageView button, int X): void
    interface outButton(ImageView button): void
    interface roRes(ImageView button): void

    main(
        myDices: PairOfDice
        rbDices: PairOfDice
        myScore: Text
        rbScore: Text
        rollBt: ImageView
        disBt: ImageView
        resBt: ImageView
        win: ImageView
        winBG: ImageView
    )

    rollBtPress(MouseEvent event)
    disBtPress(MouseEvent event)
    resBtPress(MouseEvent event)
    reStart()
    checkWinner()
    playEnd()
    checkButton(int signal)
    inButton(ImageView button, int X)
    outButton(ImageView button)
    roRes(ImageView button)
}
